description: Scheduled Report Generation — BullMQ cron job that generates daily/weekly analytics snapshots and emails summary reports to team leads. Includes: report template system (pipeline summary, lead conversion, revenue trends, SLA compliance), PDF/HTML report rendering, email delivery via notifications worker, configurable schedule per tenant, report archive storage
notes: Depends on analytics router (IFC-024) for data queries and ai-worker queue infrastructure (IFC-168) for job processing. Reports delivered via existing notifications-worker email channel. Consider tenant-configurable schedules (daily/weekly/monthly).
